title: digitaria leucocoma
intro: Digitaria leucocoma, also known as Dhanicha or Dheka, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Digitaria leucocoma include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, Digitaria leucocoma is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, and is also added to traditional Indian medicines such as Churna and Kwath.
